description_long: This object is a round, orange pumpkin with a pronounced, dark brown stem curling at the top. The pumpkin's surface is segmented with deep, dark grooves running vertically, giving it a ribbed appearance. On one side, a menacing face is carved in a traditional jack-o'-lantern style, featuring sharply angled eyes and a wide, sinister grin, all cut out to reveal the hollow interior. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is uncarved, displaying a natural, matte orange skin with subtle shading and texture variations. The stem is thick and slightly twisted, adding to the organic realism of the object. The overall look is festive and slightly spooky, making it suitable for Halloween or autumn-themed urban settings.
description: A round, orange pumpkin with a dark, twisted stem and a carved, sinister jack-o'-lantern face on one side. The surface is ribbed and matte, with deep grooves and a natural texture.
description_view_0: The front view shows the carved jack-o'-lantern face with sharp eyes and a wide, menacing grin, along with the twisted stem at the top.
description_view_1: This side view displays the pumpkin's ribbed surface and grooves, with only a hint of the carved face visible at the edge.
description_view_2: The back view reveals the uncarved, smooth orange surface and the full shape of the twisted stem.
description_view_3: Another side view, similar to view 1, showing the ribbed texture and a partial glimpse of the carved face.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled eyes and a wide, sinister grin. The features are cut out, creating bold, expressive shapes typical of Halloween motifs.
